Careers at CPC

A career that
grows with you.

CPC employs 500+ direct team members across five states. We invest in your training, recognise your work every month, and promote from within, because today's cleaner is tomorrow's team leader.

This is not casual work through an agency. This is a real job with a real team behind you.

Apply Now → About CPC Academy

Why CPC

What makes CPC different as an employer

Direct employment: not an agency

You work for CPC, not through a labour hire firm. That means real entitlements, job security and a team that actually knows your name.

CPC Academy: your training pathway

Our in-house training program takes you from day one through to certified professional, and on to leadership if that's where you want to go.

Stable, consistent work

Government and institutional contracts mean predictable shifts, not last-minute casual calls. Build your week around work you can count on.

Recognition that means something

Monthly and quarterly awards, newsletter shoutouts, and real cash rewards for team members who go above and beyond. Your work gets noticed.

A team that reflects Australia

58% female. 10% Indigenous. Team members who speak more than a dozen languages. We've built a team where everyone is genuinely welcome.

A real path forward

Many of our supervisors and area managers started exactly where you are. We promote from within, and your next step is available from day one.

CPC Academy

We don't just hire cleaners.
We develop professionals.

CPC Academy is our in-house training and development program. From your first day on site through to leadership roles, there's a structured pathway to grow, at your own pace, on your own terms. Every module you complete builds real skills, real confidence, and real opportunities within CPC.

55%

of Academy-trained staff are Taking on extra tasks, supporting area managers and getting involved in site inspections

27%

of Academy-trained staff are Assisting with stock, compliance tasks and building confidence in communication

18%

of Academy-trained staff are Stepping into higher responsibility roles and preparing for supervisor pathways

Your Career Pathway

1

Cleaner

Your starting point

→
2

CPC Academy

Skills & certification

→
3

Leading Hand

More responsibility

→
4

Site Supervisor

Run your own site

→
5

Area Manager

Lead multiple teams

Every step is achievable. Many of CPC's current supervisors and area managers began as cleaners and progressed through exactly this pathway.

Career Spotlight

From cleaner to
Area Supervisor in 3 years.

When Choden Choden joined CPC, she started exactly where many of our team members start — working on site as a cleaner. Through hard work, reliability and a willingness to learn, she progressed through every level of the business.

Today, Choden oversees multiple sites across Brisbane as our Area Supervisor, working closely with teams to maintain the high standards our clients expect.

Cleaner → Leading Hand → Site Supervisor → Area Supervisor

Choden's advice:

  • Take pride in your work
  • Be reliable and support your team
  • Complete CPC Academy training
  • Put your hand up when opportunities arise
"

When I started as a cleaner, I focused on doing my job well and learning as much as I could. CPC gave me opportunities and support, and I was always encouraged to step up.

CC

Choden Choden

Brisbane Area Supervisor, joined CPC as a Cleaner

At CPC

Today's cleaner can truly become tomorrow's leader. Choden's journey is not an exception — it's what we're building the company to enable.

Recognition & Rewards

Your work gets noticed.

We have structured programs to recognise and reward the people who show up, step up and deliver — every month, every quarter, every module.

Cleaner of the Month

Two team members recognised each month for consistency, reliability and client feedback, each awarded a $50 gift card.

Cleaner of the Quarter

Our standout performer across the quarter is recognised and awarded a $50 gift card for exceptional contribution.

Academy Reward Draw

Every team member who completes a CPC Academy module enters a random $25 gift card draw. Keep learning, keep winning.

Monthly Shoutouts

Named recognition in the CPC team newsletter for team members who go above and beyond: client praise, covering shifts, inspection results.

Refer a Friend: $100

Know someone who'd be a great fit? Refer them and if they stay 4+ weeks, you receive a $100 voucher as a thank-you.

Our Team

500+ people.
One team.

Our workforce spans five states and speaks more than a dozen languages. 58% of our team are women. 10% identify as Indigenous. We actively build an inclusive team, and we mean it.

500+
Direct employees
1,000+
Sites serviced daily
58%
Female workforce
10%
Indigenous participation
5
States operating
30+
Years in business

Welcome to the team

English Welcome to the team!
Spanish ¡Bienvenidos al equipo!
Portuguese Bem-vindos à equipe!
Vietnamese Chào mừng đến với đội ngũ!
Hindi टीम में आपका स्वागत है!
Filipino Maligayang pagdating sa koponan!
Mandarin 欢迎加入团队！
French Bienvenue dans l'équipe!

Wherever you're from, whatever language you speak at home — you belong here.

Apply

Ready to join the team?

We're always looking for great people, whether you're brand new to cleaning or an experienced professional looking to step into something more. You don't need years of experience to apply. We hire for reliability and attitude, and we train everything else.

Send your name, the state you're in, the type of work you're looking for, and any certifications or clearances you hold to our HR team. We'll take it from there.

hr@cpclean.com.au
We reply to all applications. No application goes unread.

Relocation Opportunities

CPC is currently growing in Brisbane, Sydney, Cairns and South NSW, with full-time opportunities available in Townsville for team members open to relocation. Relocation can be a great way to step into a new role and accelerate your career. Mention your interest in your email.

For New Clients

Get a Cleaning Proposal

Tell us about your sector and sites. We'll design a compliance-driven cleaning program around your obligations and schedule.

  • ✓ Site assessment included
  • ✓ Sector-specific proposal
  • ✓ Response within 5 business days
Request a Proposal →

For Procurement Teams

Due Diligence Hub

All compliance credentials in one place for formal procurement evaluation. No request required.

  • ✓ ISO 9001 / 14001 / 45001 certificates
  • ✓ Modern slavery statement
  • ✓ Social procurement documentation
  • ✓ Insurance and WHS documentation
Access Due Diligence Hub →

Commercial Property Cleaning: ISO-certified, carbon neutral cleaning services across Australia. Government, industrial, education and corporate sectors.
